programme.title: Drive Review
programme.desc: (G) Ride shotgun with Susannah as she puts the plug-in hybrid Lexus NX450H Plus through its paces. Trent gets behind the wheel of a new Corvette. James tests the sporty Haval HG GT.

programme.title: Drive Review
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Review
programme.desc: (G) Go off-road with Kez and the Land Rover Defender. James tests the towing chops of the Mazda CX-5. Trent drives one of Australia's best-selling EVs, the Tesla Model 3.

programme.title: Drive Review
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.
